title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 263.220 - Duty of prosecuting attorney
text:
263.220.  Duty of prosecuting attorney. — It shall be the duty of the prosecuting attorney of the county to prosecute all actions brought under section 263.190.
(RSMo 1939 § 14263, A.L. 2011 H.B. 458 merged with S.B. 356) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12600; 1919 § 12121; 1909 § 746
